pr.title: Non-record: 11L MLP3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Full SOTA Stack (mean val_bpb=1.1330, 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: 11-layer 512d transformer pairs MLP 3.5x LeakyReLU with SmearGate, Bigram/Trigram Hash, Value-Residual ResFormer, Gated Attention, XSA, and partial RoPE.
techniques: MLP 3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 with Value Residual + Gated Attention across all layers
SmearGate plus BigramHash(10240)/TrigramHash(4096) with Partial RoPE (16/64) and U-Net skips
Late QAT + Int6 GPTQ-lite per-row quantization with zstd-22 compression
